name: Quick Scraper API
description: Quick Scraper API handles proxy servers, browsers, and CAPTCHA so that you can get the HTML from any website with an easy API call. Supports JavaScript rendering, custom headers, geographic location targeting, premium residential proxies, device type selection, and parser addons.
